promptDescription: - **pad** — Parallel Arc Diagrams for bipartite temporal interactions (JOSS 2020). Two parallel horizontal axes (top = source entities, bottom = target entities) connected by cubic Bezier arcs. Arc color encodes time (blue=early → red=late); arc thickness = interaction weight. Best for: customer↔product purchases over time, employee↔project assignments, user↔content interactions, any two-sided relationship with a temporal dimension. IMPORTANT: Use lazy SQL — embed as "sql":"..." in the spec. Required SQL column aliases: `src` (source/top-axis entity, e.g. CustomerName or LastName), `tgt` (target/bottom-axis entity, e.g. ProductName), `ts` (numeric time, e.g. EXTRACT(year FROM OrderDate)::int or YYYYMM integer), `value` (numeric weight, e.g. COUNT(*) or SUM(LineTotal)). Use GROUP BY src, tgt, ts. Optional spec fields: `srcLabel` (top-axis label), `tgtLabel` (bottom-axis label), `tsLabel` (legend label). Spec: { "type":"pad", "title":"...", "sql":"SELECT c.LastName AS src, p.Name AS tgt, EXTRACT(year FROM soh.OrderDate)::int AS ts, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ...", "srcLabel":"Customers", "tgtLabel":"Products", "tsLabel":"Year" }
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){var ML=155,MR=20,MT=80,MB=80;var links=spec.links||[];if(!links.length){wrap.style.cssText='padding:16px;color:#888;font-size:13px';wrap.textContent='PAD: no data — need columns: src, tgt, ts (numeric time), value';return;}var srcSet={},tgtSet={},tsList=[];links.forEach(function(lk){if(lk.src)srcSet[lk.src]=(srcSet[lk.src]||0)+(lk.value||1);if(lk.tgt)tgtSet[lk.tgt]=(tgtSet[lk.tgt]||0)+(lk.value||1);if(lk.ts!=null)tsList.push(+lk.ts);});var srcList=Object.keys(srcSet).sort(function(a,b){return srcSet[b]-srcSet[a];});var tgtList=Object.keys(tgtSet).sort(function(a,b){return tgtSet[b]-tgtSet[a];});var minTs=tsList.length?Math.min.apply(null,tsList):0;var maxTs=tsList.length?Math.max.apply(null,tsList):1;if(minTs===maxTs){minTs-=1;maxTs+=1;}function tsColor(ts){var t=(+ts-minTs)/(maxTs-minTs);var r=Math.round(30+t*200);var g2=Math.round(60+Math.sin(t*Math.PI)*80);var b=Math.round(230-t*200);return 'rgb('+r+','+g2+','+b+')';}var W=Math.max(600,(wrap.clientWidth||wrap.offsetWidth||900)-32);var N_SRC=srcList.length,N_TGT=tgtList.length;var axisW=Math.max(W-ML-MR,Math.max(N_SRC,N_TGT)*70);var svgW=ML+axisW+MR;var topY=MT;var botY=MT+220;var svgH=botY+MB;var srcSpan=axisW/(Math.max(N_SRC-1,1));var tgtSpan=axisW/(Math.max(N_TGT-1,1));var srcX={},tgtX={};srcList.forEach(function(e,i){srcX[e]=ML+i*srcSpan;});tgtList.forEach(function(e,i){tgtX[e]=ML+i*tgtSpan;});var NS='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';var el=function(tag,attrs,par){var e=document.createElementNS(NS,tag);Object.keys(attrs||{}).forEach(function(k){e.setAttribute(k,attrs[k]);});if(par)par.appendChild(e);return e;};var tx=function(tag,attrs,val,par){var e=el(tag,attrs,par);e.textContent=val;return e;};wrap.innerHTML='';wrap.style.cssText='overflow:auto;font-family:var(--font,system-ui,sans-serif);user-select:none;';if(spec.title){var h=document.createElement('div');h.style.cssText='font-size:13px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;padding:8px 0 4px;color:var(--text,#333);';h.textContent=spec.title;wrap.appendChild(h);}var hint=document.createElement('div');hint.style.cssText='font-size:10px;color:#aaa;text-align:center;padding:0 0 4px;';hint.textContent='Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan · Arc color = time (blue=early, red=late) · Thickness = weight';wrap.appendChild(hint);var scr=document.createElement('div');scr.style.cssText='overflow-x:auto;';wrap.appendChild(scr);var svg=el('svg',{width:svgW,height:svgH,style:'display:block;cursor:grab;'},scr);el('rect',{x:0,y:0,width:svgW,height:svgH,fill:'var(--bg,#fff)'},svg);var defs=el('defs',{},svg);var grad=el('linearGradient',{id:'pad_tg',x1:'0%',x2:'100%',y1:'0%',y2:'0%'},defs);el('stop',{offset:'0%','stop-color':tsColor(minTs)},grad);el('stop',{offset:'50%','stop-color':tsColor((minTs+maxTs)/2)},grad);el('stop',{offset:'100%','stop-color':tsColor(maxTs)},grad);var g=el('g',{},svg);el('line',{x1:ML,y1:topY,x2:ML+axisW,y2:topY,stroke:'var(--border2,#bbb)','stroke-width':'1.5'},g);el('line',{x1:ML,y1:botY,x2:ML+axisW,y2:botY,stroke:'var(--border2,#bbb)','stroke-width':'1.5'},g);tx('text',{x:ML-8,y:topY+4,'text-anchor':'end','font-size':'11','font-weight':'600',fill:'var(--text,#444)'},(spec.srcLabel||'Source'),g);tx('text',{x:ML-8,y:botY+4,'text-anchor':'end','font-size':'11','font-weight':'600',fill:'var(--text,#444)'},(spec.tgtLabel||'Target'),g);srcList.forEach(function(e){var x=srcX[e];el('line',{x1:x,y1:topY-5,x2:x,y2:topY,stroke:'#999','stroke-width':'1.5'},g);var lbl=e.length>16?e.slice(0,15)+'…':e;tx('text',{x:x,y:topY-8,'text-anchor':'start','font-size':'9',fill:'var(--text2,#555)',transform:'rotate(-40,'+x+','+(topY-8)+')'},lbl,g);});tgtList.forEach(function(e){var x=tgtX[e];el('line',{x1:x,y1:botY,x2:x,y2:botY+5,stroke:'#999','stroke-width':'1.5'},g);var lbl=e.length>16?e.slice(0,15)+'…':e;tx('text',{x:x,y:botY+10,'text-anchor':'start','font-size':'9',fill:'var(--text2,#555)',transform:'rotate(40,'+x+','+(botY+10)+')'},lbl,g);});var maxVal=1;links.forEach(function(lk){if((lk.value||1)>maxVal)maxVal=lk.value||1;});links.forEach(function(lk){var x1=srcX[lk.src],x2=tgtX[lk.tgt];if(x1==null||x2==null)return;var sw=Math.max(0.8,Math.sqrt((lk.value||1)/maxVal)*4.5);var col=tsColor(+(lk.ts||0));var mid1y=topY+(botY-topY)*0.35;var mid2y=topY+(botY-topY)*0.65;var d='M '+x1+' '+topY+' C '+x1+' '+mid1y+','+x2+' '+mid2y+','+x2+' '+botY;var path=el('path',{d:d,fill:'none',stroke:col,'stroke-width':''+sw,opacity:'0.55','stroke-linecap':'round',cursor:'pointer'},g);var ttEl=document.createElementNS(NS,'title');ttEl.textContent=(lk.src||'')+' → '+(lk.tgt||'')+(lk.ts!=null?' · time:'+lk.ts:'')+(lk.value?' · count:'+lk.value:'');path.appendChild(ttEl);path.addEventListener('mouseenter',function(){path.setAttribute('opacity','1');path.setAttribute('stroke-width',''+(sw*1.8));});path.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){path.setAttribute('opacity','0.55');path.setAttribute('stroke-width',''+sw);});});var lx=ML,ly=svgH-46,lw=160,lh=8;el('rect',{x:lx,y:ly,width:lw,height:lh,fill:'url(#pad_tg)',rx:'2'},svg);tx('text',{x:lx,y:ly+lh+12,'font-size':'9',fill:'#999','text-anchor':'start'},''+minTs,svg);tx('text',{x:lx+lw,y:ly+lh+12,'font-size':'9',fill:'#999','text-anchor':'end'},''+maxTs,svg);tx('text',{x:lx+lw/2,y:ly-4,'font-size':'9',fill:'#aaa','text-anchor':'middle'},(spec.tsLabel||'Time'),svg);var zoom={scale:1,tx:0,ty:0};var drag2={active:false,sx:0,sy:0,stx:0,sty:0};var applyT=function(){g.setAttribute('transform','translate('+zoom.tx+','+zoom.ty+') scale('+zoom.scale+')');};svg.addEventListener('wheel',function(e){e.preventDefault();var f=e.deltaY<0?1.12:0.89;var rect=svg.getBoundingClientRect();var mx=e.clientX-rect.left,my=e.clientY-rect.top;zoom.tx=mx+(zoom.tx-mx)*f;zoom.ty=my+(zoom.ty-my)*f;zoom.scale*=f;applyT();},{passive:false});svg.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){drag2.active=true;drag2.sx=e.clientX;drag2.sy=e.clientY;drag2.stx=zoom.tx;drag2.sty=zoom.ty;svg.style.cursor='grabbing';e.preventDefault();});svg.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){if(!drag2.active)return;zoom.tx=drag2.stx+(e.clientX-drag2.sx);zoom.ty=drag2.sty+(e.clientY-drag2.sy);applyT();});svg.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){drag2.active=false;svg.style.cursor='grab';});svg.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){drag2.active=false;svg.style.cursor='grab';});svg.addEventListener('dblclick',function(){zoom={scale:1,tx:0,ty:0};applyT();});}
